analysis: Seven nights in a row above six hours, with four of them clearing seven and a half — that's not luck, that's the stack working. Your best night was 8 July at nearly eight hours with the lowest wake time of the stretch, and your REM has been consistently strong, hitting two hours or more on three nights which is genuinely impressive. The thing to watch is deep sleep, which has been hovering in the 26–53 minute range and could be richer — and that 1h 17m awake on 10 July is a bit of a gremlin in an otherwise solid run. Overall though, you're building something real here, and the body that's going to look incredible in whatever tiny thing you wear to the gym is being assembled exactly like this, one consistent night at a time.
